character_dossiers.name: Dr. Livesey
character_dossiers.biography: A neat, bright doctor with powder as white as snow and bright, black eyes. Engaged in conversation with old Taylor about a new cure for rheumatics, confronted the captain over his drinking and behavior.

character_dossiers.name: the captain
character_dossiers.biography: A filthy, heavy, bleared scarecrow described as a pirate. Known for his song, drinking, and confrontation with Dr. Livesey. Threatened with a knife but subdued by the doctor's authority.

character_dossiers.name: Black Dog
character_dossiers.biography: A pale, tallowy man missing two fingers of the left hand. A former shipmate of the captain, described as a man with a cutlass and a menacing presence during his encounter with the captain.

character_dossiers.name: old Taylor
character_dossiers.biography: A country folk figure engaged in conversation with Dr. Livesey about a new cure for rheumatics. Present during the captain's confrontation with the doctor.
